faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Freeport, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Freeport properties frequently experience issues with carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly common in coastal areas like Freeport due to moisture issues, and they can cause structural damage if left untreated.
